mapper.select: SELECT * FROM follows WHERE follower_id = #{followerId} AND following_id = #{followingId}
SELECT * FROM follows WHERE follower_id = #{followerId} ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{limit}
SELECT * FROM follows WHERE following_id = #{followingId} ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{limit}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM follows WHERE follower_id = #{followerId}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM follows WHERE following_id = #{followingId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO follows (id, follower_id, following_id, created_at) VALUES (#{id}, #{followerId}, #{followingId}, #{createdAt})
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM follows WHERE follower_id = #{followerId} AND following_id = #{followingId}
